exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your side hustle development forward
items: Conduct a skills and interests audit by listing your top 10 professional skills and 5 personal interests that could be monetized
Research and analyze 5 successful side hustles in your chosen field by studying their business models, pricing strategies, and target customers
Calculate your minimum viable income target by determining how much money you need to earn monthly to make your side hustle worthwhile
Create a dedicated workspace and establish daily/weekly time blocks specifically for your side hustle activities
Define your target customer by creating detailed profiles of 3 specific people who would pay for your side hustle service or product
Assess your current financial situation by calculating your available startup capital and monthly budget allocation for side hustle expenses
